quantum_mech.title: Craft a Quantum Mechanism — the 5-step sequenced assembly chain at the heart of Create: Teleporters

teleporter_built.title: Place and activate a Teleporter pad — register destination with TP Link and supply Quantum Fluid

subtitle.text: Five steps. Redstone Pearl. Quantum Fluid. Advanced Component. Quantum Mechanism. Then: anywhere, instantly.

description: as its Phase 17 Mastery Age trigger.
Crafting one advances the pack's age system.
Create Mixer (heated): Ender Pearl + Rose Quartz
Item Application: Railway Casing + Quantum Fluid Bucket
deploy Sturdy Sheet → deploy Redstone Pearl → press
fill 250 mB Quantum Fluid → deploy Advanced Component → press
└ Place Entity Teleporter pad at source
└ Register destination with TP Link item
└ Supply Quantum Fluid via pipe (continuous feed)
└ Entity walks on pad = teleport to registered destination

└ Build it to unlock late-game age advancements
